title: Q1 2026 AI funding blows past 2025 total with three deals accounting for 67% of capital - PitchBook
snippet:
Image 104: PIZZA

Aleksandr Zubkov/Getty Images

AI startups raised $255.5 billion globally in Q1 2026, surpassing the 2025 full-year total for AI venture funding, according to PitchBook’s latest AI VC Trends report. But three deals accounted for two-thirds—or $172 billion—of that capital.
